{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45076", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Impact

In federated rooms, malicious homeservers can craft room events in such a way that prevents Synapse from providing full history to paginating clients.

Clients could therefore fail to display room history.

### Patches

Update to Synapse 1.152.1 or later.

### Workarounds

There are no known workarounds for this issue.

### Identifiers

- ELEMENTSEC-2025-1636

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, please email us at [security at element.io](mailto:security@element.io).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00369, "percentile": 0.28556}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T16:18:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45076"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:31Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T16:18:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/element-hq/synapse/security/advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45076", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/matrix-synapse/PYSEC-2026-194.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/element-hq/synapse/security-advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/element-hq/synapse", "summary": "Synapse pagination Denial of Service", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:18:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6qf2-7x63-mm6v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.152.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "matrix-synapse"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.152.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Synapse pagination Denial of Service
